display_name.description: Required. Display name of the watchlist. Note that it must be at least one character and less than 63 characters (https://google.aip.dev/148).

entity_population_mechanism.description: Mechanism to populate entities in the watchlist. Structure is [documented below](#nested_entity_population_mechanism).

location.description: The location of the resource. This is the geographical region where the Chronicle instance resides, such as "us" or "europe-west2".

instance.description: The unique identifier for the Chronicle instance, which is the same as the customer ID.

multiplying_factor.description: Optional. Weight applied to the risk score for entities in this watchlist. The default is 1.0 if it is not specified.

watchlist_user_preferences.description: A collection of user preferences for watchlist UI configuration. Structure is [documented below](#nested_watchlist_user_preferences).

pinned.description: Optional. Whether the watchlist is pinned on the dashboard.

watchlist_id.description: Optional. The ID to use for the watchlist, which will become the final component of the watchlist's resource name. This value should be 4-63 characters, and valid characters are /a-z-/.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
